allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate Jekyll site to Astro with SVG smiley and basic auth

- Convert Protovis-based pixel art to pure SVG with CSS
- Add mouse-tracking eyes using vanilla JavaScript
- Set up Cloudflare Pages middleware for basic auth on /2bwed/ and /photos/
- Create responsive layout with vmin units
- Only draw borders between different-colored pixels
- Switch to bun package manager

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add darker outer edge borders to smiley

- Interior pixel borders use #d4d4d4
- Outer edge borders use #bfbfbf \(10% darker\)
- Explicitly draw borders as lines for precise control

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
